{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314091739EF9B9613DBF99BCF1D"}"},"total":60},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7323836291409789759","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的作品，文笔也不错。中途差点被气的看不下去了，但是又不甘心，坚持看完。人物刻画的像真实的一样。看完了感觉真的是很好的作品，如果能拍成电视剧就太好了。结局还算不错。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705214955,"group_id":"7138212146193632296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny5SWgFjJQa5lKSXkasODt/Ac0aMnY233xWTChAB32gJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3457343407810680","user_name":"喜欢豆果榕的清源宗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3457343407810680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138212146193632296","book_info":{"abstract":"和仇家儿子的隐秘恋情，导致了弟弟在一场意外中横死。
无法接受丧子之痛，有辱门风的父亲将女儿顾燕扫地出门。
女主独创省城，打工中结识了深爱她的厚道男人，并最终结为连理的丈夫陆宏。
但真正走到一起后，却因为双方家庭门第差距，以及丈夫事业的连连受挫，顾燕的生活窘迫，不如意一直困扰着她。
为了改善一贫如洗的家庭状况，顾燕重返职场，却意外的得知，自己任职的房地产公司老板正是自己的初恋情人邢宇。
邢宇不仅给予了顾燕经济上的照顾，还重新点燃了两个人心底从未熄灭的情愫。
直到多年未见的父亲弥留之际，父女再见，顾燕才意识到父亲对家人，家乡的大情大爱，才是人间正道。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ca22cf557a3897a23afeb98966c49390~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"获鹿","author_id":"","book_id":"7138212146193632296","book_name":"情坎","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f04028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1205人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":127,"name":"职场","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127&name=职场&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7138224503850697253","read_count":"1205","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1147717"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"568","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,职场","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ca22cf557a3897a23afeb98966c49390~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430157&x-signature=DzgYPD4k5mfwJZ9le8sBHAlp1vA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3047477697850732","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"180"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314091739EF9B9613DBF99BCF1D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":47468,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":12111},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"co 为了改善一贫如洗的家庭状况，顾燕重返职场，却意外的得知，自己任职的房地产公司老板正是自己的初恋情人邢宇。
邢宇不仅给予了顾燕经济上的照顾，还重新点燃了两个人心底从未熄灭的情愫。
